text:
最近暑いところばっかりだったから
心機一転、今度は寒いところだよ！

え？　極端すぎ？
いいじゃない、いいじゃない。
動いてればすぐ温まるって！

それにそこは、二人の熱気で
氷をも溶かす、とかぐらいまで
言ってほしいなあ。

So! Since we've had enough of the heat
I figured it's time we switch gears and
head some place cold instead!

This is beyond cold, you say?
Oh come on, don't get nit-picky. You'll be
plenty warm as long as you keep moving!

Plus, of course you believe our passion alone is
enough to melt through all the ice, right?
At any rate, let's get to it!
